summary: The eth-wire message divergence is rustfmt-only: invalid-message returns and request/response match arms are reformatted without changing protocol message decoding or classification.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 144: M	crates/net/eth-wire-types/src/message.rs.
The isolated patch only adds semicolons to invalid-message and UnexpectedLength returns and reflows `matches!` alternatives.
No Eth version validity check, GetNodeData/NodeData decoding branch, request/response classification, request-pair consumed length check, or RLP behavior changed.
